mapper.insert:
insert into fr_annotation_${sequenceNumber} ( area, perimeter, category_id, description, location_type, annotation_type,
contour40000, contour10000, contour2500, contour625,
create_by, update_by, slide_id, project_id, structure_id, structure_size, id, create_time, update_time )values( #{area}, #{perimeter}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{locationType}, #{annotationType},
ST_SetSRID(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}),4327), ST_SimplifyPreserveTopology(ST_SetSRID(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}),4327),0.5), ST_SimplifyPreserveTopology(ST_SetSRID(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}),4327),4), ST_SimplifyPreserveTopology(ST_SetSRID(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}),4327),32),
#{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{slideId}, #{projectId}, #{structureId}, #{structureSize}, #{id}, now(), now() )

insert into fr_annotation_${sequenceNumber} ( area, perimeter, category_id , contour40000, contour625, contour2500, contour10000, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, project_id, slide_id, structure_id, structure_size, review_round_id ,id ) values
( #{item.area}, #{item.perimeter}, #{item.categoryId},
ST_SetSRID(st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour40000}),4327), ST_SetSRID(st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour625}),4327), ST_SetSRID(st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour2500}),4327), ST_SetSRID(st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour10000}),4327),
#{item.locationType}, #{item.annotationType}, #{item.createBy}, NOW(), #{item.projectId}, #{item.slideId}, #{item.structureId}, #{item.structureSize}, #{item.reviewRoundId} ,#{item.id} )
mapper.select: SELECT n_live_tup FROM pg_stat_user_tables where schemaname='public' and relname = 'fr_annotation_${sequenceNumber}'
select count(*) from pg_class where relname = 'fr_annotation_${sequenceNumber}'
mapper.insert: DROP SEQUENCE IF EXISTS fr_annotation_${sequenceNumber}_annotation_id_seq; CREATE SEQUENCE fr_annotation_${sequenceNumber}_annotation_id_seq START 1;
mapper.select: select annotation_id, area, perimeter, description, category_id, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, project_id, slide_id, structure_id, structure_size, review_round_id, id, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour40000) AS contour from fr_annotation_${sequenceNumber} where annotation_id = #{annotationId}
